note: The bundled-font manifest: the single source of truth for the faces that ship with Library Tool. static/fonts.css, the font block in static/app.js, and this directory's README.md are all GENERATED from it and committed (the frozen sidecar serves static/ read-only and cannot generate them at run time). Edit with: python tools/fontman.py add|rm, then: python tools/fontman.py generate. See docs/fonts.md.

sections.fonts: Chrome faces -> BUNDLED_FONTS. Offered in the Settings font pickers.
sections.typeset: Typesetting faces -> TYPESET_FONTS. RESERVED for the Replica engine's facsimile pages; never offered as an interface font. Add with: fontman.py add --typeset

fonts.source: Google Fonts (fonts.gstatic.com), Roboto Slab variable v36, latin subset
